    T

    takeLowerBuildingCard(Player, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Takes one building from the lower building row by index, paying its food cost.
    takeLowerTribeCard(Player, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Takes one character card from the lower tribe row by index.
    takeUpperBuildingCard(Player, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Takes one building from the upper building row by index, paying its food cost.
    takeUpperTribeCard(Player, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Takes one character card from the upper tribe row by index.
    TOP - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.Position
    Top position in the offer or display.
    toString() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Returns a compact textual summary of the current game state.
    toString() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage
    Returns a string representation of the ActionMessage.
    Tribe - Class in it.polimi.Game.Elements
    Base type for every tribe card in the game.
    Tribe(Era, Position) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Tribe
    Creates a tribe card with the given era and position.
    Turn_End_Card - Class in it.polimi.Buildings
    Represents a building that provides an effect triggered at the end of a round or turn.
    Turn_End_Card(Era, Position, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Turn_End_Card
    Constructs a Turn_End_Card building with the specified properties.
    Turn_Start_Effect - Class in it.polimi.Buildings
    Represents a building that provides an effect triggered at the beginning of a round or turn.
    Turn_Start_Effect(Era, Position, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Turn_Start_Effect
    Constructs a Turn_Start_Effect building with the specified properties.
    TurnOrderTrackRule(int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.TurnOrderTrackRule
    Constructs a new turn order track rule.
